query.query_string: Sodium carbonate AND dry eye syndrome

data.query: Sodium carbonate AND dry eye syndrome

results.title: Impact of a sodium carbonate spray combined with professional oral hygiene procedures in patients with Sjögren's syndrome: an explorative study.
results.abstract: The aim of this study was to make an initial estimation on the effects of a sodium bicarbonate and xylitol spray (Cariex® ), associated with non-surgical periodontal therapy, in participants with primary Sjögren's syndrome.
